function.name: lookup_user
function.description: Look up a user by ID, name, or search query. Returns matching user records with profile info.

query.description: Search by name or user ID

user_id.description: Exact user ID to look up

function.name: get_user_summary
function.description: Get a comprehensive summary of a user including their contacts, tags, groups, linked agents, and access control info for the calling agent.

function.name: list_users
function.description: List all users with pagination and optional filtering by tag or group.

function.name: add_user_contact
function.description: Add a contact (phone, email, Telegram ID, etc.) to an existing user.

user_id.description: User ID to add contact to

external_user_id.description: The external ID on that channel

function.name: manage_user_tags
function.description: Add or remove tags on a user. Tags control access: 'public' allows all agents, 'agent:X' allows only agent X, 'restricted' limits to group-only.

function.name: list_groups
function.description: List all available groups and their member counts.

function.name: create_group
function.description: Create a new group for organizing users and agents.

function.name: manage_user_groups
function.description: Add or remove a user from a group. Only works if the calling agent can manage users.

action.description: Add or remove user from group

function.name: get_access_control_info
function.description: Get detailed access control info explaining why an agent can or cannot communicate with a user.

user_id.description: The user ID to check access for

function.name: block_user
function.description: Block or unblock a user (admin only). Blocked users cannot receive messages from any agent.

blocked.description: True to block, False to unblock

function.name: merge_users
function.description: Merge one user record into another (admin only). Source user contacts/tags/groups are reassigned to target.

source_id.description: User ID to merge FROM (will be soft-deleted)

target_id.description: User ID to merge INTO (target keeps all data)
